reviews.review_description: I can see this becoming a £20 game
Needs a variety of zombies and maps but it’s still fun

reviews.review_title: It's a great game simple but good
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty fun keep in mind it's still in early access so there isn't that much too it yet besides just shooting zombies but I look forward to seeing this game get some updates the only problem I have is that it can have a bit of lag but that's ok but if your looking for a cool zombie shooter game I definitely recommend
I have spent hours on Split Second, and this is like a Zombies mode of it like in Call of Duty. Fun, intense, and super gorey. I can’t wait for the new maps and new mechanics!
